privileged_info_summary: The task operates in a synthetic CoppeliaSim environment and requires programmatically generating a PID tuning study on a robot joint. It has been verified that the expected output paths for the study results are exactly '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/pid_tuning_data.csv' and '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/pid_tuning_report.json', which perfectly match the explicit instructions and the export script logic.
